description_long: This humanoid robot features a compact, bipedal form with a rounded head, expressive faceplate, and articulated limbs. Its arms are long and slender, extending outward and upward in a dynamic pose, with visible joints at the shoulders, elbows, and wrists. The torso is robust and slightly segmented, with a central display or panel on the chest, and the waist is narrower, connecting to sturdy, jointed legs. The legs are proportionate to the body, with clear knee and ankle joints, and the feet are broad and flat for stability. The robot's exterior is primarily smooth and metallic, with some matte and glossy finishes, and it is accented by darker joint and hand areas. The overall design suggests a functional, interactive urban robot capable of expressive gestures and mobility.
description: A humanoid robot with a rounded head, expressive faceplate, articulated limbs, and a robust, smooth metallic body, posed with arms raised outward.
description_view_0: Front view showing the robot's faceplate, chest display, and both arms raised outward in a wide V-shape.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the robot's profile, limb articulation, and the thickness of the torso and legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, torso, and legs, with arms extended outward and visible joint details.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the robot's profile, limb joints, and the structure of the legs and feet.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with both arms raised outward and upward in a wide V-shape, legs straight and feet flat on the ground, head facing forward.
attribute_clothing_style: No visible clothing; the robot is covered in integrated panels and smooth metallic surfaces with some darker joint coverings.
attribute_facial_features: The face features a smooth, rounded faceplate with two circular eye-like elements and a simple mouth slit, giving an expressive, friendly appearance.
attribute_limb_articulation: Arms and legs have multiple visible articulation points: ball or hinge joints at shoulders, elbows, wrists, hips, knees, and ankles, allowing a wide range of motion; hands appear to have basic finger articulation.
attribute_presence_of_sensors: Visible sensors include two camera-like elements on the faceplate (eyes) and a possible display or sensor panel on the chest.
